compliance_patterns.description: MENA private sector tenders typically require vendor registration, financial statements, and references
Many MENA private enterprises operate bilingually (Arabic/English)

evaluator_insights.insight: MENA private sector clients value regional presence and cultural understanding
evaluator_insights.implication: Proposals should emphasize local team, regional offices, and cultural competence
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Highlight regional client portfolio and local team expertise

evaluator_insights.insight: Private sector evaluators in MENA prioritize speed and commercial pragmatism
evaluator_insights.implication: Proposals must demonstrate ability to deliver value quickly with lean governance
evaluator_insights.recommended_action: Include quick-win deliverables within the first phase and lean project governance

recommended_search_queries: MENA private sector consulting best practices
forbidden_assumptions: Do NOT assume any specific country's regulations without RFP evidence
Do NOT assume corporate governance maturity level — assess during discovery
Do NOT reference country-specific programs or visions unless the RFP explicitly mentions them
IMPORTANT: This is a FALLBACK pack — jurisdiction-specific compliance requires manual review
